title: Optimize directory traversal by using filepath.WalkDir which avoids unnecessary sys calls.
body:
filepath.Walk calls os.Lstat for every file or directory to retrieve os.FileInfo.
filepath.WalkDir avoids unnecessary system calls since it provides a fs.DirEntry,
which includes file type information without requiring a stat call.

So replace Walk with WalkDir

This improves performance by reducing redundant system calls.

comments.body:
Do you have a concrete example of what you think should change.
AFAICT we are already using filepath.WalkDir everywhere https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/d106b294b428fbb10f59d4cafe72c3dcaa4e73bb
@Luap99 I guess you are only left to replace it here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/c285c7220fed552aa2c4a5a6180ff0190d64f0c7/cmd/podman/common/completion.go#L1649.

yeah there is only one occurrence left, the other one in Podman cannot be replaced with WalkDir.

Opened a PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25164

Replacing the one with WalkDir here doesn't makes sens as its using ModTime method which is not included in the DirEntry interface directly. We would have to call Info() which again will call FileInfo interface.
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/c285c7220fed552aa2c4a5a6180ff0190d64f0c7/pkg/machine/pull.go#L187

But the one here can be switched to WalkDir. https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/c285c7220fed552aa2c4a5a6180ff0190d64f0c7/cmd/podman/common/completion.go#L1649
